generated_exposure.exposure_text: Retired General (3 stars) here. After 35 years in uniform, I can tell you: Strategic autonomy isn't about isolation - it's about resilience. When I commanded in Europe, we faced constant supply chain disruptions. Local production of critical components isn't just smart defense policy, it's what keeps our forces ready when crises hit. The data shows 78% of NATO allies agree - we can't afford to be dependent in a crisis. #NationalSecurityFirst
